name: Layered Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz bean dip or refried beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together sour cream, mayonnaise and taco seasoning. Set aside.
2. Use a 9-inch or 10-inch pie pan or disposable aluminum pizza pan.
3. Spread a layer of bean dip or refried beans on the bottom of the pan.
4. Spread avocados over the beans in an even layer.
5. Spread sour cream mixture on top.
6. Sprinkle grated cheddar and grated jack cheese on top, followed by a layer of olives and a layer of tomatoes.
7. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
8. Serve with bowls of tortilla chips. Serves 8.
